data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for routing rules to queue/review/checkout based on lead quality or service type. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that confirm the existence or functionality of these routing rules. The linked use case mentions the need for such routing rules, but there is no concrete evidence to support their implementation, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of routing rules to queue/review/checkout based on lead quality or service type.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for routing rules
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the routing rules based on lead quality or service type.
